detectors.description:
Madis.sendETHToFee(uint256) (Madis.sol#607-613) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Madis.sol#609)
	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Madis.sol#611)
detectors.markdown:
[Madis.sendETHToFee(uint256)](Madis.sol#L607-L613) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [_teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2))](Madis.sol#L609)
	- [_marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2))](Madis.sol#L611)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Madis._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Madis.sol#459-587):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Madis.sol#555)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Madis.sol#601)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Madis.sol#561)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Madis.sol#609)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.div(2)) (Madis.sol#611)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Madis.sol#583)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Madis.sol#713)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Madis.sol#693)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Madis.sol#695)
	Madis._rOwned (Madis.sol#223) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Madis._takeTeam(uint256) (Madis.sol#707-715)
	- Madis._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Madis.sol#689-703)
	- Madis.balanceOf(address) (Madis.sol#339-343)
	- Madis.constructor(address,address) (Madis.sol#285-303)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Madis.sol#583)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Madis.sol#721)
	Madis._rTotal (Madis.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Madis._getCurrentSupply() (Madis.sol#787-797)
	- Madis._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Madis.sol#719-725)
	- Madis.constructor(address,address) (Madis.sol#285-303)
	- Madis.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Madis.sol#395-403)

detectors.description: Madis.addLiquidity() (Madis.sol#627-649) ignores return value by IERC20(uniswapV2Pair).approve(address(uniswapV2Router),type()(uint256).max) (Madis.sol#647)

Madis.addLiquidity() (Madis.sol#627-649) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Madis.sol#637)

Madis.allowance(address,address).owner (Madis.sol#357) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (Madis.sol#135-139) (function)

Madis._approve(address,address,uint256).owner (Madis.sol#445) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (Madis.sol#135-139) (function)

Madis.constructor(address,address).addr2 (Madis.sol#285) lacks a zero-check on :
		- _marketingFunds = addr2 (Madis.sol#289)

Madis.constructor(address,address).addr1 (Madis.sol#285) lacks a zero-check on :
		- _teamAddress = addr1 (Madis.sol#287)

Ownable.constructor().msgSender (Madis.sol#125) lacks a zero-check on :
		- _owner = msgSender (Madis.sol#127)

Reentrancy in Madis.addLiquidity() (Madis.sol#627-649):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (Madis.sol#635)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Madis.sol#637)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Madis.sol#637)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _maxTxAmount = 12500000000 * 10 ** 9 (Madis.sol#645)
	- cooldownEnabled = true (Madis.sol#641)
	- liquidityAdded = true (Madis.sol#643)
	- swapEnabled = true (Madis.sol#639)

detectors.description:
Madis._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Madis.sol#459-587) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool)(buycooldown[to] < block.timestamp) (Madis.sol#489)
	- require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp) (Madis.sol#505)
	- firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp (Madis.sol#507)

	- [require(bool)(sellcooldown[from] < block.timestamp)](Madis.sol#L505)
	- [firstsell[from] + (86400) < block.timestamp](Madis.sol#L507)

detectors.description: Madis._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Madis.sol#459-587) has a high cyclomatic complexity (14).

Version constraint ^0.8.4 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (Madis.sol#1)
